title: Aehr Test Systems Reports Q3 Fiscal 2024 Results and Reiterates Full Year Guidance
text: Aehr Test Systems reported Q3 fiscal 2024 results with revenue of $7.6 million, down 56% from the year-ago quarter. The company posted a GAAP net loss of $1.5 million, or $0.05 per diluted share. Despite the challenging quarter, the company reported strong bookings of $24.5 million, up significantly from Q2 bookings of $2.2 million. The company maintains visibility into material revenues from current customers in the next fiscal year, particularly from electric vehicle opportunities in Asia. The company reiterated full-year FY2024 guidance for revenues greater than $65 million and GAAP net income of at least $11 million. Key revenue drivers include demand for silicon carbide testing systems and emerging silicon photonics applications.
